name: stromcom/php-i18n
description: Translator.stromcom.cz client + AST-based scanner for PHP / Twig / XSLT sources. Runtime t() helper, PSR-15 locale middleware, Symfony Console workflow. Zero regex on sources.

suggest.ext-intl: Required for ICU plural / number formatting via MessageFormatter; without it the runtime falls back to plain {var} substitution via strtr() (no plurals).
suggest.ext-xsl: Required for XsltScanner and XsltRenderer (XSLT-based templates). Without it those classes will throw 'XSLTProcessor not found' on first use — but auth.stromcom.cz / Twig-only projects do not need it.
